case_title: MICKEY CHEN VS. JOSE M. GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, MICKEY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JOSE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICKEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-25-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JOSE M.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICKEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JOSE M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
